title: crocanthemum exaltatum
intro: Crocanthemum exaltatum, also known as tall hairy ruellia or tall ruellia, is a flowering plant species in the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crocanthemum exaltatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
